name: pm-skills-marketplace
description: Product Management skills for AI agents

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: 59 PM skills covering the full product lifecycle: 26 phase skills, 8 foundation skills (including the v2.12.0 OKR Skills set, the v2.11.0 Meeting Skills Family, lean-canvas, and persona), 6 utility skills, and 15 v2.15.0 tool skills (Foundation Sprint family of 7, Design Sprint family of 7, and tool-note-and-vote standalone implementing Knapp/Zeratsky/Kowitz canonical sprint methodologies under the new classification:tool taxonomy). Includes templates, examples, workflows (incl foundation-to-design end-to-end arc), thread-aligned samples (Brainshelf + Storevine + Workbench), and lifecycle tools for creating, validating, and iterating skills. Follows the agentskills.io specification.
